title: Amtech F3300 100mm (4") Wire wheel
features: TOUGH AND EFFECTIVE CLEANING: This 100mm (4") wire wheel has brass plated steel wire for the effective removal of rust, paint, scale and dirt
DURABLE: With a 6.25mm (1/4") shank and a zinc plated steel arbor, it operates at a maximum 4,500 RPM
SIZE CAPACITY: 100 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description 1/4" shank zinc plated steel arbour Brass plated wire Removes rust, paint, scale and dirt etc Maximum 4500 rpm Maximum 4500 rpm - - There's nothing more satisfying that a job well done, whether that's a major project or a small repair but some of us need a bit of a helping hand in terms of getting the right tool for the job. Amtech have literally thousands of high quality products and you are almost guaranteed to find exactly what your looking for. Safety Warning No
